meaning: n.安排,配置,计划,阴谋,方案,图解,摘要v.计划,设计,图谋,策划
examples: We devised a scheme to help him.
This isn't the first harebrained scheme he's had.
The government has twice declined to back the scheme.
At the same time, Singleton is looking to integrate the Internet into his grand scheme.
Adam Hart, from the Gloucester Bee Guardians Project, said the scheme would start next February.
